title: Senior Software Engineer - Sasken Technologies Holdings Services - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Sasken Technologies Holdings Services - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Sasken Technologies Holdings Services in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
